'''√k-m-r''' ('''kakamar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deattach|deattach]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deattach|deattach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √k-m-r
|-
! Lemma
| kakamar
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thikamar || jikamar || shikamar || kikamar
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthukamar || jujukamar || shushukamar || kukukamar
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thukamar || jukamar || shukamar || kukamar
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thukamar || jukamar || shukamar || kukamar
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thekamar || jekamar || shekamar || kekamar
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothokamar || jojokamar || shoshokamar || kokokamar
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thokamar || jokamar || shokamar || kokamar
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thokamar || jokamar || shokamar || kokamar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kamar || kamar || kamar || kamar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kamar || kamar || kamar || kamar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kamar || kamar || kamar || kamar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kamar || kamar || kamar || kamar
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thækamar || jækamar || shækamar || kækamar
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathakamar || jajakamar || shashakamar || kakakamar
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thakamar || jakamar || shakamar || kakamar
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thakamar || jakamar || shakamar || kakamar
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shakamar
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshakamar
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishakamar
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shakamarnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshakamarnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishakamarnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shakamarshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshakamarnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishakamarshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shakamarro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshakamarnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishakamarro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shakamarmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshakamarnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishakamarmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shakamarsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshakamarnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishakamarsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shakamarng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshakamarnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishakamarng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shakamarya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshakamarnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishakamarya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shakamaryam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshakamarnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishakamaryam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shakamarnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshakamarnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishakamarnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shakamarnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshakamarnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishakamarnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shakamarnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshakamarnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishakamarnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shakamarshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshakamarnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishakamarshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shakamarshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshakamarnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishakamarshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shakamarshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshakamarnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishakamarshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shakamarronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshakamarnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishakamarronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shakamarroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshakamarnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishakamarroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shakamarromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshakamarnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishakamarromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shakamarmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshakamarnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishakamarmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shakamarmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshakamarnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishakamarmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shakamarmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshakamarnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishakamarmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
